subcodes.first_line: The Ancient King hath brought forth the peoples of the world from utter nothingness and non-existence, specifically for the recognition of His sacred Essence, into the realm of visible existence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مالک قدم اهل عالم را مخصوص عرفان ذات مقدسش از عدم و نیستی بحت بعالم شهود و
subcodes.subjects: @station of the Manifestation of God, @knowledge; recognition of God, @light and darkness, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @presence of; reunion with God, @the ephemeral and the eternal, @living waters; water of life
